title: bidens microphylla
intro: Bidens microphylla, also known as Small Beggarticks or Small Bur-marigold, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, among others. Bidens microphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
